steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks why Tía Ana is eager to restore the parlor each day. The key phrase is "special province" — the text frames the parlor as her territory, used for her school, now repurposed daily as a salon.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'honor': No mention of honor or reputation in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B — 'social escape': The text says nothing about Tía Ana seeking escape from social obligations. ✗
  • Choice C — 'betrayal': The tone doesn't support betrayal — her eagerness is territorial, not wounded. ✗
  • Choice D — domain disrupted by the repurposing': The parlor is her "special province" — the daily repurposing disrupts her domain, explaining her eagerness to restore it. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
